CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER, ts TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 20:38:48'), (2, TIMESTAMP '1992-03-22 01:02:03.1234');
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1993-07-18 15:30:00'), (2, TIMESTAMP '1993-07-18 17:45:00');
SELECT e.event_id, greatest(e.event_time, t.ts) AS latest_event_time FROM events e JOIN timestamps t ON e.event_id = t.id;
SELECT greatest(greatest(ts, TIMESTAMP '1992-01-01'), TIMESTAMP '1995-12-31') FROM timestamps;
WITH temp AS (SELECT ts FROM timestamps WHERE id = 1) SELECT greatest((SELECT ts FROM temp), TIMESTAMP '1994-05-06 12:00:00') AS max_time;
SELECT greatest(TIMESTAMP '1993-01-01 12:00:01', greatest(TIMESTAMP '1993-01-01 12:00:00', TIMESTAMP '1995-01-01 12:00:00')) AS final_max_time;
